items.title: Michael Olise Avoids Yellow Card vs. Morocco, Will Be Available For World Cup Semifinals
items.summary: Michael Olise avoided the worst-case scenario in France's 2-0 win over Morocco in the 2026 FIFA World Cup quarterfinals on Thursday at Boston Stadium.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
